## Checklist

- [ ] Docker Compose services start cleanly (`docker compose up -d`)
- [ ] Dashboard JSON is valid (no `__inputs` or `__requires` blocks)
- [ ] No new Docker services added without discussion
- [ ] Sensitive values (IPs, tokens, passwords) are not hardcoded
- [ ] Comments explain *why*, not just *what*
